items.final_wording: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne
source.population: Adolescents and adults with acne complaints, including post-adolescent acne.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth acne documentation; treatment selections remain clinician-entered and pending review.

exact_location.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

source.evidence_paraphrase: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.

items.rationale: Supports adolescent acne distribution, lesions, scarring, prior treatment and psychological impact for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne
source.population: Adolescents and adults with acne complaints, including post-adolescent acne.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed acne severity and hormonal context for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists scarring risk, depression or severe psychosocial impact, treatment non-response, endocrine concern, and severe or nodulocystic acne.
